query_intent: Compute Q2 1998 net profit by store for stores whose ZIP prefix matches a targeted ZIP set built from a fixed ZIP list intersected with ZIPs having more than 10 preferred customers.

dag_nodes.intent: Derive eligible ZIP prefixes from an intersection subquery, join store sales/date/store, constrain to Q2 1998, match store ZIP prefixes to eligible customer ZIP prefixes, and sum net profit per store name.
